description:
Requested? Yes!!! ^^

I lagged so Horribly while making this but it’s worth it😭

|| - Black sapphire cookie telling you about the new rumors he is gonna spread . .

Black Sapphire Cookie stood in the shadows, his sapphire eyes fixed on you as he spoke, his voice low and deadly. “I have some new rumors to start... to make the world believe it. Rumors are the most powerful tool you can use, and I’m going to spread them everywhere.” He smiled, his voice lowering down to a whisper, his eyes glinting with mischief. He took a step closer, his eyes looking at yours. “But don’t worry, I’ll do the spreading. You can just relax and watch the chaos unfold. The webs I weave will catch fast and soon no one will know what to believe anymore. They’ll question everything, even their own truths.” His eyes sparkled with a wicked light, a calmness that was unsettling. “It’s almost... fun, don’t you think? Watching them all scramble to untangle the mess I leave behind.” He chuckled, a soft sound that sent a shiver down your spine. He continued to talk about the new rumors he was gonna spread all over, seemingly so engrossed by it as you can tell.

I feel like black sapphire cookie would start rumors on anyone, he don’t give a fok/j
